name: Financial Services CTO / VP Engineering
persona: CTO, VP Engineering, Head of AI
problem_statements: MiFID II / FCA require call recording and data residency — standard cloud meeting bots don't comply
Conversational AI vendors can't integrate into Zoom/Teams without months of custom engineering
Every AI vendor requires separate meeting integrations — no unified layer
value_prop: Sonesse gives financial services firms one compliant API to integrate any conversational AI into Zoom, Teams and Google Meet — with the data residency and audit trail regulators require.
how_we_help: Single API replaces bespoke integrations. Compliance baked in. Deploy any AI vendor (voice, video, chat) into meetings in days, not months. Full audit logging for FCA/MiFID II.
buying_trigger: Hiring AI/ML engineers for meeting integration, evaluating conversational AI vendors, post-Series B scaling contact centre

name: Healthcare / NHS Digital Leader
persona: Chief Digital Officer, CTO, Head of Clinical AI
problem_statements: GDPR + clinical data regulations mean AI in patient-facing meetings must be on-prem or private cloud
Meeting AI is underused in healthcare precisely because integration complexity is too high
Each AI vendor requires separate compliance sign-off and integration — slows adoption to years
value_prop: Sonesse enables compliant, on-prem meeting AI for healthcare — one integration that works with any approved AI vendor inside Zoom or Teams, without breaching data sovereignty requirements.
how_we_help: On-prem/private cloud deployment option. Vendor agnostic — use whatever AI you've already approved. Single integration point reduces compliance surface area and accelerates deployment.
buying_trigger: Digital transformation programmes, AI strategy being built, new CDO hired, NHS AI adoption initiatives

name: Legal Technology Director
persona: CTO, Director of Legal Technology, COO
problem_statements: Legal privilege concerns mean any recording or transcription tool needs watertight data controls
Client confidentiality rules out standard SaaS meeting bots without significant legal review
Lawyers want AI in client meetings but compliance teams block deployment
value_prop: Sonesse removes the compliance blocker for legal AI — giving firms control over where data lives and how it's processed, with a single API to deploy approved AI into Zoom or Teams.
how_we_help: Private deployment with full data sovereignty. Enables real-time AI assistance in client calls without breaching privilege. One integration for all meeting AI — reduces the compliance review surface.
buying_trigger: Legal tech strategy refresh, new CTO, firm evaluating AI assistants for client work, innovation budget approved

name: PE/VC Portfolio Value Creation Lead
persona: Operating Partner, Head of Value Creation, CTO in Residence
problem_statements: Portfolio companies are all building AI strategies independently — no shared infrastructure or learnings
Meeting AI pilots at portfolio level get stuck on integration complexity before showing value
Investing in AI tooling per company is expensive — no leverage across the portfolio
value_prop: Sonesse gives PE funds a single meeting AI integration layer they can deploy across portfolio companies — accelerating AI adoption and creating measurable operational leverage.
how_we_help: One commercial agreement, deployed across portfolio. Shared integration infrastructure removes per-company engineering cost. Portfolio-level reporting on meeting AI ROI.
buying_trigger: New fund raise, AI value creation thesis being built, operating partner hired to drive AI across portfolio
